title: hopea dasyrrhachis
intro: Hopea dasyrrhachis, also known as the Hopea dasyrrhachis tree, is a species of plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hopea dasyrrhachis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its use in treating various ailments such as fever and digestive issues. In traditional herbal preparations, Hopea dasyrrhachis is often made into a tea or decoction, and its bark and leaves are also used in folk remedies.
